creator: iblis.dif01@nctu.edu.tw
text:
Created attachment 200356
julia v1.0.3 patch

This is a bugfix release.

https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/releases/tag/v1.0.3

% portlint  
looks fine.

poudriere testport

    - passed on 11.2-RELEASE amd64 with default OPTIONS
    - passed on 11.2-RELEASE i386  with default OPTIONS
    - passed on 12.0-RELEASE amd64 with default OPTIONS
    - passed on 12.0-RELEASE i386  with default OPTIONS

    - passed on 11.2-RELEASE amd64 with all OPTIONS enabled
    - passed on 11.2-RELEASE i386  with all OPTIONS enabled
    - passed on 12.0-RELEASE amd64 with all OPTIONS enabled
    - passed on 12.0-RELEASE i386  with all OPTIONS enabled

    - passed on 11.2-RELEASE amd64 with default OPTIONS + OPENLIBM
    - passed on 11.2-RELEASE i386  with default OPTIONS + OPENLIBM
    - passed on 12.0-RELEASE amd64 with default OPTIONS + OPENLIBM
    - passed on 12.0-RELEASE i386  with default OPTIONS + OPENLIBM
